task_description: Render trained 3D Gaussian scenes into RGB frames for novel-view synthesis, AR/VR or visualization.
input_shape_or_dataset: Mip-NeRF 360; Tanks and Temples; DTU MVS; Blender/LLFF-style scenes; per-scene Gaussian primitive sets
core_kernels_or_stages: frustum culling; 3D-to-2D projection; tile binning; depth sorting; alpha blending; framebuffer writeback
bottleneck_hypothesis: Frame time is often limited by tile-list imbalance, sorting length, repeated Gaussian parameter movement and alpha-blend work rather than dense FLOPs alone.
target_platforms: GPU; mobile GPU; FPGA; ASIC; edge SoC
known_implementations: GraphDeco gaussian-splatting; gsplat; GSCore; A-SSCC Gaussian Splats FPGA processor; GCC; 3DGauCIM
notes: Inventory row aggregates WORKLOAD-3D-001 and ASPLOS/MICRO/A-SSCC venue evidence; no implementation was run.

task_description: Render neural radiance fields through ray sampling, encoding lookup, MLP evaluation and volume compositing.
input_shape_or_dataset: Calibrated multi-view image sets; Instant-NGP/NeRF scenes; Nerfstudio project data pipelines
core_kernels_or_stages: ray generation; occupancy-guided sampling; positional or hash-grid encoding; small MLP; volume rendering/compositing
bottleneck_hypothesis: Bottleneck can shift between sample count, hash-grid lookup bandwidth, small-MLP utilization and volume compositing; GPU tensor throughput alone is not enough to explain performance.
target_platforms: GPU; FPGA; ASIC; PIM/CIM prototype; mobile GPU
known_implementations: Instant-NGP; Nerfstudio; MobileNeRF; Booth-NeRF; RT-NeRF; Hardware Acceleration of Neural Graphics; NeuRex
notes: Use as neural-rendering workload family; exact kernels differ by representation.

task_description: Train or update Gaussian scenes where optimizer state, gradients and large primitive sets exceed comfortable GPU-memory limits.
input_shape_or_dataset: 3DGS training scenes; large city/VR scenes reported by ASPLOS 2026 rows; per-Gaussian parameters and optimizer state
core_kernels_or_stages: forward rasterization; gradient accumulation; density control; optimizer update; CPU/host offload; sparsity-guided loading
bottleneck_hypothesis: Training can become memory-capacity and host-device pipeline limited; throughput claims must record scene size, quality metrics and offload traffic.
target_platforms: GPU; CPU+GPU; CXL/tiered memory candidate; FPGA/ASIC training accelerators
known_implementations: LightGaussian; CLM-GS; GS-Scale; BOA-3DGS; BalanceGS; Garnet
notes: Recent 2025-2026 rows are frontier signals; code URLs were not executed.

workload_name: Gaussian-map SLAM and online neural mapping
task_description: Use Gaussian or neural-scene representations as mutable robot/AR maps for tracking, rendering and map update.
input_shape_or_dataset: RGB-D or monocular SLAM sequences; TUM RGB-D; ScanNet-style data; SplaTAM and Gaussian Splatting SLAM examples
core_kernels_or_stages: camera tracking; keyframe selection; Gaussian insertion/pruning; differentiable rendering; map expansion; pose optimization
bottleneck_hypothesis: Average FPS is insufficient because tracking/update tail latency and map-state growth affect closed-loop use.
target_platforms: GPU; edge GPU; FPGA/ASIC SLAM accelerators; mobile SoC
known_implementations: SplaTAM; Gaussian Splatting SLAM; SGS-SLAM; GauSPU; AGS; RTGS; REACT3D
notes: No robot deployment was run; this row records runnable and paper-reported entry points only.

task_description: Serve autoregressive Transformer requests by running prompt prefill followed by repeated decode iterations under latency and throughput constraints.
input_shape_or_dataset: Prompt/generation traces; variable sequence lengths; chat/RAG/agent serving requests
core_kernels_or_stages: tokenization boundary; QKV/GEMM; attention; MLP; sampling; KV cache update; request scheduler
bottleneck_hypothesis: Prefill is compute and attention-tile heavy, while decode often becomes weight/KV bandwidth and scheduling limited at small batch.
target_platforms: Datacenter GPU; CPU+GPU; NPU; FPGA; edge SoC
known_implementations: vLLM; TensorRT-LLM; SGLang; Orca; DistServe; Sarathi-Serve
notes: Serving engines are publicly available but not installed or benchmarked here.

task_description: Manage per-request KV state, prefix reuse and long-context memory under dynamic sequence lengths.
input_shape_or_dataset: Long-context prompts; multi-turn sessions; RAG/prefix-sharing traces; 1M-token research rows
core_kernels_or_stages: KV page/block allocation; KV read during decode; quant/dequant; prefix cache lookup; offload and prefetch
bottleneck_hypothesis: Capacity, fragmentation and bandwidth can cap concurrency before arithmetic throughput; page/block size and cache policy must be recorded.
target_platforms: GPU HBM; CPU DRAM; CXL memory; PIM/NDP; FPGA KV engine
known_implementations: vLLM/PagedAttention; KIVI; FlexGen; SGLang RadixAttention; PACT CXL/KV-cache rows
notes: Use checked_date in artifact rows for specific code/tool status.

workload_name: MoE, structured decoding and speculative generation
task_description: Handle irregular or multi-call LLM execution where routing, grammar constraints or draft-verify loops alter the normal decode path.
input_shape_or_dataset: MoE models; structured JSON/schema decoding; agent/RAG language-model programs; speculative decoding traces
core_kernels_or_stages: expert routing; dispatch/combine; top-k/top-p; finite-state decoding; draft generation; target verification
bottleneck_hypothesis: Kernel speedups may disappear if routing imbalance, communication, grammar checks or scheduler overhead dominate.
target_platforms: GPU clusters; CPU+GPU; NPU; serving runtime; FPGA research prototypes
known_implementations: Switch Transformer; Mixtral; SGLang; speculative decoding systems; TensorRT-LLM runtime optimizations
notes: Record model, router policy and runtime separately; do not merge with dense decode measurements.

task_description: Run visual, visual-inertial or RGB-D SLAM under sensor-rate and control-loop latency constraints.
input_shape_or_dataset: EuRoC MAV; TUM RGB-D; KITTI odometry; camera+IMU streams
core_kernels_or_stages: feature extraction; patch/optical-flow tracking; IMU preintegration; pose update; factor-graph optimization; loop closure
bottleneck_hypothesis: Tail latency and sparse small-matrix or graph updates can matter more than average front-end FPS.
target_platforms: CPU; embedded GPU; FPGA front-end; robot SoC
known_implementations: ORB-SLAM3; VINS-Mono; DSO; DROID-SLAM; SLAMBench2; SlimSLAM/SuperNoVA venue rows
notes: No SLAM sequence was run; this row records benchmarkable workload shape.

workload_name: LiDAR, map and local planning workloads
task_description: Maintain point-cloud, voxel, ESDF/TSDF or occupancy state for localization, collision checking and planning.
input_shape_or_dataset: KITTI LiDAR; FAST-LIO/LIO-SAM traces; OctoMap/Voxblox maps; local cost maps
core_kernels_or_stages: deskew; point-cloud transform; nearest-neighbor lookup; k-d tree/octree/voxel update; ESDF query; collision check; trajectory rollout
bottleneck_hypothesis: Irregular state updates, random memory access and deadline-bound planning queries can dominate compute throughput.
target_platforms: CPU; embedded GPU; FPGA/SoC; NPU for learned perception
known_implementations: FAST-LIO2; LIO-SAM; OctoMap; Voxblox; OMPL; TrajOpt; MPPI implementations
notes: Map-query workload should be profiled with update/query distributions, not only total runtime.

task_description: Generate robot actions from camera images, language goals and robot state using VLA, Transformer, diffusion or action-chunking policies.
input_shape_or_dataset: Open X-Embodiment; DROID; BridgeData V2; LIBERO; robot camera+language+proprioception episodes
core_kernels_or_stages: visual encoder; language/VLM fusion; autoregressive action tokens; action chunking; diffusion/flow denoising; policy head
bottleneck_hypothesis: Batch=1 latency, p99 jitter, action representation and power budget are more relevant than cloud serving throughput.
target_platforms: GPU/NPU edge SoC; robot workstation; FPGA safety/coproc candidate
known_implementations: RT-1; RT-2; OpenVLA; OpenVLA-OFT; Diffusion Policy; ACT; pi0
notes: Model repositories are not evidence of deployability on a specific robot without running and logging hardware.

workload_name: Dense tensor and fused inference kernels
task_description: Evaluate dense linear algebra, tensor contraction, attention and graph/operator fusion as reusable accelerator motifs.
input_shape_or_dataset: HPL; GEMM microbenchmarks; MLPerf Inference models; TensorRT/ONNX/XLA graphs
core_kernels_or_stages: GEMM; convolution; tensor contraction; softmax; norm; epilogue fusion; layout transform
bottleneck_hypothesis: High arithmetic intensity can still be limited by intermediate tensor materialization, launch overhead or layout conversion.
target_platforms: CPU; GPU; TPU/NPU; FPGA; ASIC
known_implementations: HPL; BLIS; cuBLAS; CUTLASS; TVM; TensorRT; ONNX Runtime; OpenXLA
notes: Use vendor-optimized baselines when making performance claims.

task_description: Evaluate sparse linear algebra, graph traversal, pointer chasing and dynamic work queues.
input_shape_or_dataset: HPCG; GAP Benchmark Suite; Graph500; SuiteSparse/GraphBLAS-style sparse inputs; PACT/ASPLOS sparse rows
core_kernels_or_stages: SpMV; SpMM; sparse triangular solve; BFS/SSSP/PageRank; gather/scatter; atomic/reduction; work queue
bottleneck_hypothesis: Low arithmetic intensity, load imbalance and random access often dominate; FLOP/s is usually a poor primary metric.
target_platforms: CPU; GPU; NDP/PIM; FPGA; ASIC sparse accelerator
known_implementations: HPCG; GAPBS; Graph500; GraphBLAS; Gamma; Spada; Flexagon; near-data pointer chasing papers
notes: Record input graph/sparsity distribution and format conversion overhead.

workload_name: Stencil, FFT, scan, sort and reduction motifs
task_description: Evaluate structured-grid, spectral, prefix, histogram, sorting and collective communication kernels.
input_shape_or_dataset: NAS Parallel Benchmarks; PolyBench; FFTW examples; 3DGS tile sort traces; distributed/HPC traces
core_kernels_or_stages: stencil update; halo exchange; FFT butterfly/transpose; radix/bitonic sort; prefix scan; global reduction
bottleneck_hypothesis: Bottlenecks are often memory reuse, permutation, synchronization or all-to-all communication rather than scalar arithmetic.
target_platforms: CPU; GPU; FPGA dataflow; ASIC; HPC cluster
known_implementations: NAS NPB; FFTW; PolyBench; SODA; TAPA examples; 3DGS sorting accelerators
notes: 3DGS and robotics rows reuse these motifs; keep motif metrics separate from full application metrics.

task_description: Map C/C++/DSL kernels into FPGA pipelines with loop pipelining, memory partitioning, task-level dataflow and host-device I/O.
input_shape_or_dataset: PolyBench/HLS kernels; stencil kernels; streaming vision/3DGS subgraphs; Vitis examples
core_kernels_or_stages: loop pipeline; task dataflow; FIFO channels; AXI/HBM access; array partition/reshape; fixed-point datapath
bottleneck_hypothesis: HLS II reports can be invalidated by memory stalls, FIFO backpressure, timing failure or host-device copy overhead.
target_platforms: Xilinx/AMD Alveo and Versal; Intel FPGA; Zynq/MPSoC
known_implementations: Vitis HLS; TAPA; HeteroCL; SODA; AutoSA/other HLS rows in FPGA/FCCM/FPL/ICCAD
notes: Do not treat synthesis estimates as board measurements.

task_description: Explore resource, timing, buffer sizing, placement and architecture choices for FPGA accelerator design.
input_shape_or_dataset: Koios-style DL benchmarks; COMBA/DNNBuilder benchmarks; FIFOAdvisor/HLS-Timer tasks; vendor examples
core_kernels_or_stages: design-space search; pragma selection; FIFO sizing; timing estimation; memory allocation; physical-aware scheduling
bottleneck_hypothesis: Search-time and QoR predictability matter; a generated design must still close timing and be runnable on target hardware.
target_platforms: FPGA CAD tools; HLS compilers; architecture simulators; open-source FPGA flows
known_implementations: COMBA; DNNBuilder; Koios 2.0; FIFOAdvisor; HLS-Timer; RapidStream/TAPA
notes: Some code links are from venue evidence rows and need author/release confirmation.

workload_name: FPGA host, cloud and memory-streaming workloads
task_description: Measure accelerator integration overheads around PCIe, CXL, HBM, cloud FPGA virtualization and streaming libraries.
input_shape_or_dataset: Cloud FPGA kernels; HBM memory managers; PCIe streams; CPU-FPGA platform traces
core_kernels_or_stages: host enqueue; DMA; PCIe/CXL transfer; HBM allocation; stream scheduling; kernel execution; result copyback
bottleneck_hypothesis: End-to-end speedup can be dominated by data movement and runtime integration even if kernel II is good.
target_platforms: Cloud FPGA; Alveo/HBM FPGA; CPU-FPGA research platforms; chiplet/eFPGA SoCs
known_implementations: JetStream; cloud FPGA virtualization rows; UltraMalloc; Enzian; CICC eFPGA/chiplet rows
notes: This row is an integration workload category; exact artifacts differ by venue.

task_description: Move attention, token pruning, KV-cache or matrix-vector work into or near memory arrays to reduce data movement.
input_shape_or_dataset: Transformer/LLM attention traces; dynamic token pruning; KV cache; BERT/ViT/edge LLM rows
core_kernels_or_stages: matrix-vector operations; attention score/softmax approximation; KV read; token pruning; array-level accumulation
bottleneck_hypothesis: Data movement may improve, but ADC/DAC, precision, array utilization, device nonideality and software mapping can dominate.
target_platforms: SRAM-CIM; RRAM/ReRAM-CIM; DRAM-PIM; digital CIM; simulator/prototype chips
known_implementations: AttAcc; PRIMATE; Transformer Hetero-CiM; M3DKV; CIMFormer; LoRA-CIM; TCAD ReRAM Transformer
notes: Artifact status often simulator-only or unverified; do not infer silicon adoption.

workload_name: CXL, far memory and tiered-memory systems
task_description: Expand, pool or disaggregate memory with CXL/far-memory mechanisms and measure workload sensitivity to latency, bandwidth and migration.
input_shape_or_dataset: Memory-intensive server workloads; LLM KV/offload traces; page migration traces; far-memory microbenchmarks
core_kernels_or_stages: page placement; page migration; memory pooling; CXL.mem access; coherence/cache interaction; prefetch and tiering policy
bottleneck_hypothesis: Capacity expansion can hide GPU/DRAM limits but added latency, bandwidth contention and coherence costs must be measured.
target_platforms: CPU+CXL memory expander; CXL fabric; remote memory; simulator; prototype system
known_implementations: CXL 3.0 spec; Clio; Nimble; SDFM; Mitosis; PACT CXL/KV rows; vCXLGen/CXLfork venue rows
notes: CXL spec and code repos are not evidence that a benchmark ran locally.

workload_name: Near-data graph, pointer and sparse workloads
task_description: Move graph, linked-list or sparse operations closer to memory where pointer chasing and random access dominate.
input_shape_or_dataset: GraphSAR graphs; GAP/Graph500 graphs; linked-list traversal; sparse matrices; NDP research traces
core_kernels_or_stages: pointer chasing; sparse gather/scatter; graph frontier expansion; PIM allocation; reduction/atomic support
bottleneck_hypothesis: Random access can benefit from near-data execution, but load balance, programmability and host synchronization remain risks.
target_platforms: PIM/NDP simulator; 3D-stacked memory; ReRAM crossbar; CPU+NDP
known_implementations: GraphSAR; Connection-based PIM; Optimal Data Allocation; PACT linked-list traversal; HPCA/ICCD NDP rows
notes: Many rows are title/abstract-level; use as candidate workload family, not a stable benchmark.

task_description: Normalize benchmark, artifact and profiling evidence across domains before comparing accelerator claims.
input_shape_or_dataset: Any workload in this inventory; benchmark scripts; profiler traces; simulator output; power logs
core_kernels_or_stages: baseline identification; run configuration; counter collection; timeline tracing; claim ledger update
bottleneck_hypothesis: Without baseline provenance, tool versions, input shape and measurement level, speedup and energy claims are not comparable.
target_platforms: GPU; FPGA; ASIC simulator; SoC; CPU/HPC cluster
known_implementations: Nsight Systems/Compute; CUPTI; ROCProfiler; Vitis Analyzer; Linux perf; Perfetto; Arm Streamline; Timeloop/Accelergy; MLPerf
notes: This row records methodology workload, not a single benchmark result.

task_description: Track whether code, data, scripts and hardware requirements exist and whether claims are runnable, unchecked, evaluated, restricted or missing.
input_shape_or_dataset: Paper artifact packages; GitHub repos; Zenodo archives; benchmark datasets; official artifact-evaluation badges
core_kernels_or_stages: URL check; license/access check; dependency and hardware requirement extraction; artifact status assignment
bottleneck_hypothesis: A public URL is not equivalent to a local execution result; hardware-specific artifacts may be effectively access-restricted.
target_platforms: Local audit scripts; web/source checks; artifact evaluation reports; repository metadata
known_implementations: ACM artifact packages; GitHub repos; MLCommons submissions; venue artifact rows; project run cards
notes: This project did not execute artifacts; statuses are conservative by design.
